creator: uzsolt@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to vladimir.chukharev from comment #4)
About portlint: I think geogebra doesn't need gettext because it's a java app and don't use the devel/gettext.
USE_LDCONFIG: geogebra doesn't add any library into the system (/usr/local/lib).
I hope these ideas are right.

With DEVELOPER=yes only the last WARN-line ("Consider to set..." will disappear).
